AboutPage.title: About
AboutPage.description: A brief introduction to who I am.

resume.paragraf_1: Hi! I’m a fresh graduate in Informatics Engineering with a strong passion for Web Development and Data Science. During my studies, I gained hands-on experience as a Full-stack Developer through internships and also worked on academic projects in Deep Learning, Natural Language Processing, and recommendation systems.
resume.paragraf_2: I have also gained practical experience contributing to internal system development in a professional environment, focusing on fullstack development, API integration, feature implementation, and issue handling. I collaborated closely with QA and System Analyst teams to ensure system quality, stability, and alignment with business requirements.
resume.paragraf_3: In addition, I have developed several data-driven projects involved data preprocessing, feature engineering, machine learning modeling, clustering, and building interactive dashboards using tools such as Python, Streamlit, and Looker Studio.
resume.paragraf_4: I’m an analytical and adaptive learner who is eager to keep growing and contribute to creating innovative, data-driven technologies.

responsibilities: Completed 100+ endpoints/tasks in the Care Omni Loyalty project through reverse engineering and system implementation.
Resolved 38 bugs, improving system stability and performance.
Developed a change request feature (Add Event Homepage EAC) based on business requirements.
Built Front End components for Eiger Career Page (Homepage, FAQ, Privacy Policy) using a modular and clean code approach.
Developed CMS features (submission document list & detail) and integrated them with backend API.
Contributed to Product Information Management (PIM) system development on both Front End and Back End (attribute list, group, mapping).
Conducted API testing, debugging, and system monitoring.
Developed a web application using Laravel integrated with MySQL database.
Built and maintained core backend features including user authentication, Google account registration, database configuration, and password recovery, improving user security and accessibility.
Ensured smooth frontend–backend integration while maintaining and enhancing website functionality to meet user needs.
Acted as a Full-Stack Developer in building the SIM-TLA (Sistem Informasi Monitoring Tindak Lanjut Audit) web application to support audit follow up monitoring within the company.
Built frontend with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript and backend with PHP and MySQL.
Implemented key features including authentication, audit assignment management, follow up report management, audit record tracking, and user management.
Conducted testing and maintenance to ensure the system operates effectively in the company's audit process.
